message:
chore(deps): bump asupersync 0.3.0 -> 0.3.1 in fnx-runtime

Bumps the `asupersync` crate used by fnx-runtime from 0.3.0 to 0.3.1.
asupersync 0.3.1 was published to crates.io earlier today (2026-04-21
at 23:58:52Z) and is the latest stable on the 0.3.x series.

The dependency is feature-gated via `asupersync-integration`
(`dep:asupersync`) in crates/fnx-runtime/Cargo.toml, so default builds
are unaffected and the runtime only links asupersync when that feature
is turned on. This patch bump also carries along the matching sibling
crates franken-kernel, franken-evidence, and franken-decision from
0.3.0 to 0.3.1 in Cargo.lock.

Verified with:
  rch exec -- cargo update -p asupersync
  rch exec -- cargo check -p fnx-runtime --features asupersync-integration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -86,9 +86,9 @@ checksum = "7c02d123df017efcdfbd739ef81735b36c5ba83ec3c59c80a9d7ecc718f92e50"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "asupersync"
-version = "0.3.0"
+version = "0.3.1"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
-checksum = "db67031367cd5b385762deac048036624af34eb5261c69b89a387fa22ff73aab"
+checksum = "eba4173ce977db76d7434bb01f0bd94914a9719570ccb8f9e7d56ded6ba8b70a"
 dependencies = [
  "base64",
  "bincode-next",
@@ -697,9 +697,9 @@ checksum = "77ce24cb58228fbb8aa041425bb1050850ac19177686ea6e0f41a70416f56fdb"
 
 [[package]]
 name = "franken-decision"
-version = "0.3.0"
+version = "0.3.1"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
-checksum = "caa668d9d7417aeee0ee03d185c667cf423ee8368a7b579947c83dd5e1c89510"
+checksum = "0b636e1b1815517c3abba339496d144d4ccbee8da6a3c7c3d4916a9b2332c34b"
 dependencies = [
  "franken-evidence",
  "franken-kernel",
@@ -708,19 +708,19 @@ dependencies = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "franken-evidence"
-version = "0.3.0"
+version = "0.3.1"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
-checksum = "0e5159efa2a0a8310e68578db9f6b8b8aa64894135cfe55b703fc71966026604"
+checksum = "547c8a1d3e5c6a7ae33e96108dc03cabc5803d7e05ebb5b42acf172f7ba9eaff"
 dependencies = [
  "serde",
  "serde_json",
 ]
 
 [[package]]
 name = "franken-kernel"
-version = "0.3.0"
+version = "0.3.1"

-checksum = "6aff78b47d49216308598be2eb0a37694b10d81e9b9cea2263986dea61d4a7fc"
+checksum = "415a201052a6d072a869af5b39f59256cf3324669191035daf77a50cc08fa109"
 dependencies = [
